name: Railway Sandboxes
notes: Sandboxes are ephemeral by design and can be torn down when done. The TypeScript SDK, CLI, and dashboard all expose the same create/read/write/teardown operations.
summary: Railway Sandboxes provision ephemeral, isolated Linux environments on Railway that agents can control programmatically. Each sandbox is a fully isolated virtual machine that can be created from the dashboard, CLI, or TypeScript SDK, used to run commands and read and write files, then torn down. Railway targets developers building agent workflows that need short-lived, programmable compute.
